name: type1skills
description: Independent public website for Type 1 Skills.

scripts.docker:harness: docker build -f Dockerfile.harness -t type1skills:harness-review . && mkdir -p .harness-review-results && docker run --rm --network none -v "$PWD/.harness-review-results:/review/results" type1skills:harness-review
scripts.docker:harness:shell: mkdir -p .harness-review-results && docker run --rm -it --network none -v "$PWD/.harness-review-results:/review/results" --entrypoint sh type1skills:harness-review
scripts.pages:dev: pnpm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.pages:deploy: pnpm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name type1skills

author: Tiago Andres Vaz
